posts.text:
It is possible that the relationship recession will not correct itself. A striking 7% of singletons say they would consider a robo-romance with an AI companion. 

AI is patient, AI is kind and it won’t ask you to clean the bathroom or get a better job https://www.economist.com/leaders/2025/11/06/the-rise-of-singlehood-is-reshaping-the-world?taid=6a210fb31738220001344f43&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: A total of $1.8 billion in levered crypto positions were liquidated today.

This marks the largest daily crypto liquidation since January 2026.
